description: Surface a purchasable product with selectable variants. Primary goal: get the user to resolve a variant and commit to the primary action.

content_slots.price_display: product.price.regular + product.price.currency — sale price from product.price.sale when present; variant delta from selected_variant.price_delta when present
content_slots.variant_selection: product.variants — axis label and unit from product.variant_axis; selection resolves availability_status, price_display delta, and primary_action eligibility
content_slots.availability_status: product.in_stock — resolved against selected_variant.in_stock when a variant is selected
content_slots.primary_action: add to cart — commits product.id + selected_variant.id to basket

rules.default selected variant: first variant in product.variants where in_stock === true; no default if all variants are out of stock
rules.if product.price.sale is not null: activate sale signal on price_display — sale price is primary, base price is secondary
rules.if selected_variant.price_delta is not n: surface delta as a modifier on price_display — additive if positive, subtractive if negative
rules.if selected_variant.in_stock === false: suppress primary_action; surface availability_status with out-of-stock signal scoped to the selected variant
rules.if product.in_stock === false: suppress primary_action entirely; surface availability_status at product level — variant-level signals are irrelevant
rules.if product.images.length === 1: omit thumbnail navigation within media — single image only
